MODE$VIDEO$DESCRIPTION.en: Remotion-powered mode — compose and render video in the sandbox.

MODE$VIDEO$NOT_ACTIVE.en: Switch to Video mode in the sidebar to access the video editor.

MODE$VIDEO$DEPENDENCY_WARNING.en: Sandbox needs Node 18+, FFmpeg, and @remotion/* installed. Add them to the sandbox image before running renders.

MODE$VIDEO$COMPOSITION_HINT.en: Agent renders Remotion projects here — output appears in the artifacts drawer.
